---
pagetitle: start
toc: false
title-block-style: default
listing:
  - id: listing-intern
    contents: 
    - /texts/unhq/
    - /texts/carloschmid/
    type: grid
    sort: "date desc"
  - id: listing-train
    contents: 
    - /texts/maroccobytrain/
    - /texts/kyivtrain/
    - /texts/amtrak/
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    fields: [image, date, title, description] 
  - id: listing-econ
    contents: 
    - /texts/klimaoekonomik/
    - /texts/capitalorder/
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    fields: [image, date, title, description]
---

![Picasso's Guernica](images/guernica.jpg)

## Hi there

you've stumbled upon my corner of the internet. here I collect some random thoughts on things friends (and strangers) ask me about, which I am to lazy to answer directly, instead pointing them here. 

you can find out more about me on my main site: [***martenw.com***](https://martenw.com)

_No AI-slop, no ads, no cookies._

---

### fancy intern stuff

This is what most people ask for. I had the crazy opportunity to be an intern at the UN in NY, here's how I liked it (it was a fever dream; in a good way) and how I got there (so that different people get the chance to go there).

::: {#listing-intern}

:::

---

### train shenanigans

I just hate planes; the whole experience with extremely small seats, ugly airports and an abysmal environmental footprint. And because society has not invented a better method of long-distance transportation yet, I am bound to take a train everywhere I want to go. 

::: {#listing-train}

:::

---

### econ-rant

Well, sometimes studying economics, with its unrealistic models and bad policy advice, just drives you mad (_while at other times it can be beautiful_). These are more about the first part:

::: {#listing-econ}

:::

---

### notes

links and [notes](notes/) on random things I found on the internet
